textByHash.18cd054789d48e647c1e54a8b4b64df88f4785a2: Thank you, traveller. May the sun light your way.
textByHash.3418209552fe45935f2176edda44ba4fbdd41c79: Oh, nilsal, fellow traveller. You don't see many other people out here.
textByHash.63b70381239f32fc8497ee5887e6228032432205: It is a sacred pilgrimage between the Teomat and the Proudspire. I do it every year, as do many others.
textByHash.7640527aebd506d8e7253469d16803f59dfaf9e0: The Proudspire of course! I'm walking the Pilgrim Path.
textByHash.922672e43f81712a683b6c353a2766e9ccd21f8a: Nilsal to you once more, fellow traveller.
textByHash.b876026586e369dabe2004da2d0b24339091d3c3: The hardest part is the last bit: Reaching the summit of the Proudspire. Only upon touching the obelisk at the top is your journey complete.
textByHash.da2df555a00ab22affbac2120cd31ccd5fc44960: I'm still on route to the Proudspire, but I'm having a bit of a break to enjoy the scenery. Walking the Pilgrim Path can be long and arduous.
